action: C3 audit + retrospective adopt handoff schemas: profiles get output_contract field {schema: schemas/handoff-<phase>.json, expected_artifacts: [<paths>]}; personas get Output section with schema-link table; phase-gate.sh validates handoff JSON via handoff-lint.sh in WARN-only mode. Auditor promotes existing audit-report.md tables (Defects, Criteria Checks, Integrity Checks) → JSON arrays in handoff-auditor.json. ~250 LoC. Files: agents/evolve-auditor.md, agents/evolve-retrospective.md, .evolve/profiles/auditor.json, .evolve/profiles/retrospective.json, scripts/lifecycle/phase-gate.sh.
operator_note: BLOCKED-BY: C2 (schemas must exist before adoption). Touches audit critical path — high care. WARN-only validation initially: phase-gate logs schema mismatches but does NOT FAIL the gate, giving one verification cycle before C5 flips to enforce. Acceptance: each cycle's audit must validate its own handoff JSON against its own schema (recursive — system audits itself). Auditor agent's prompt updated to emit both prose audit-report.md AND handoff-auditor.json (emit-both pairing model). Retrospective already emits JSON — formalize against schema.
